summary: Comprehensive testing of Mudras page enhancement - ALL FEATURES WORKING. Backend: 11/11 tests passed. Frontend: All features verified including 25 mudra cards with AI images, category filters, detail modal with 3 tabs, YouTube video embedding, and FeaturedVideos section.

FeaturedVideos section at bottom shows 3 mudra practice videos.
